sections.label: Single Item
items: Specify the item you need. Suitable for one-off requests such as a single poster, flyer, or social media post.

sections.label: Department Social Media
items: A department social media design post. Ideal for promoting events or announcements on your department's social channels.

sections.label: Important Note
items: Requires an additional week for design and print time. Must be discussed prior to adding to your request. Subject to budget and capacity approval.

sections.label: Products
items: Bags, cups, planners, pens, stickers, pins (enamel & Crocs), etc.

sections.label: Outdoor
items: Floor decals, large window decals (window facing the plaza)

gallery.title: Graffix Trick or Tour
gallery.alt: Black and orange square Instagram post reading 'Graffix Trick or Tour' with a pumpkin and a ghost
gallery.description: A graphic used on Instagram coinciding with Halloween and the Graffix open house. Symbols were inspired by Graffix staff.

gallery.title: Larry Itliong Day
gallery.alt: Tabloid size vertical poster highlighting Filipino-American history month and Larry Itliong Day
gallery.description: A tabloid size vertical poster highlighting Filipino-American history month and Larry Itliong Day.

gallery.title: Graffix Open House
gallery.alt: Postcard promoting the Graffix open house and job fair with the work office in the background
gallery.description: This design was inspired by retro scary movie posters.

gallery.title: Smash League Tournament
gallery.alt: Instagram post promoting the Super Smash Bros Ultimate Smash League for Fall 2022 with popular game characters in Cal State LA colors
gallery.description: Instagram post promoting a Super Smash Bros. video game tournament combining e-sports aesthetics with Cal State LA colors.

gallery.title: Harvest Festival
gallery.alt: Vertical tabloid-size poster featuring a mummified Eddy the Eagle and a hand-drawn illustration of the U-SU
gallery.description: A vertical tabloid-sized poster promoting a night event at the U-SU with spooky decorations and Halloween-themed activities.

gallery.title: Fluffy Friends
gallery.alt: Instagram post featuring a notebook and paw prints promoting a pet therapy event with date and location
gallery.description: An Instagram post promoting a pet therapy event with information on when and where.

gallery.title: Brown & Gay in LA
gallery.alt: Predominantly yellow vertical tabloid-size poster with red text and a photo of author Dr. Anthony Ocampo
gallery.description: A vertical tabloid-sized poster promoting the APISRC and GSRC book event.

gallery.title: Swim in the Sounds
gallery.alt: Instagram post with a digital image of a swimming pool and a red beach ball promoting student-staff music playlists
gallery.description: An Instagram post promoting the music playlists of student-staff at Graffix.

gallery.title: Study Break of Color
gallery.alt: Instagram post depicting a student in headphones relaxing on a bean bag promoting a study break event
gallery.description: An Instagram post graphic promoting a study break event with date and location info.
